rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features.
Avoid package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless explicitly visible in the model.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Align helper declarations with the types of the expressions they represent.
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use assign for output bindings only.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package visibility
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
